title: [STORY] Setup Homelab infrastructure for prod and dev environments
description: Create apps/betting-prod/docker-compose.yml and apps/betting-dev/docker-compose.yml. In betting-prod, run 'dashboard' (port 3000, traefik bestfam.us) and 'engine' (command: python3 engine_v2.py, built from ../../../BettingApp). The engine handles the 2-3 min Discord alerting in prod. Add appropriate Traefik labels. Do the same for betting-dev on dev.bestfam.us. Add a basic test script in tests/ to pass the Integration Crucible. MUST USE homelab-queue.
